sections.recommendation:
Adopt a Resolution authorizing the City Manager, or their designee, to amend Contract
No. 32400129 with IGM Technology Corporation to add $45,203 for the annual service
fees and extend the contract term to January 31, 2027 with a not to exceed amount of
$85,203.
sections.fiscal_impacts:
Year Annual Service Fee (USD)
2025 (Year 2) $22,050
2026 (Year 3) $23,153
The purpose of this contract amendment is to pay the annual service fees for the
continued access to the Gravity budget book, capital improvement plan book and open
data transparency modules. Funding for the annual fees covered under the contract
term are included within the adopted biennial budget for fiscal years 2025 and 2026
within the City Manager Office’s operating budget.
sections.current_situation:
The Gravity software has facilitated a more efficient process to create the capital
improvement and operating budget documents. In addition, the software has enabled
staff to include more in-depth information pertaining to the budget aligning with the
Strategic Plan of advancing our goal to be a customer-focused organization that
provides excellent, timely, easily-accessible service and information to the community.
sections.background:
The City Manager executed a contract with IGM Technology Corporation in January
2024. IGM Technology Corporation was selected after City staff solicited three
proposals from vendors with open government budget platforms and evaluated the

proposals on cost, feasibility of implementation, system features and customer service.
The Gravity software was used to create the FY 2025-2029 Proposed Capital
Improvement Program and the FY 2025-2026 Proposed and Adopted Budget Books.
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
There are no identifiable environmental effects, climate impacts, or sustainability
opportunities associated with the subject of this report.
sections.rationale:
The Budget Office has spent significant time working with the vendor to develop
templates that will allow for a more efficient production of future budget documents.
Staff are satisfied with the performance of the product and responsiveness of the
company and recommend continuing to utilize the cloud-based software.
sections.alternatives:
No other alternatives were considered.
CONTACT PERSON
Sharon Friedrichsen, Budget Manager, 981-7000
sections.attachments:
1: Resolution
Page 2
Page 3 of 3
RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
CONTRACT NO. 32400129 AMENDMENT: IGM TECHNOLOGY CORPORATION FOR
DIGITAL BUDGET BOOK SERVICES
WHEREAS, the City has had an agreement with the IGM Technology Corporation to
provide digital budget book services for the Proposed and Adopted Biennial Budget,
Mid-Biennial Budget, and the Capital Improvement Plan; and
WHEREAS, IGM technology Corporation was selected after a competitive process was
undertaken and the use of these services aligns with the Strategic Plan of advancing our
goal to be a customer-focused organization that provides excellent, timely, easily-
accessible service and information to the community; and
WHEREAS, the current agreement began on January 21, 2024 and ends on January 24,
2025; and
WHEREAS, the FY 2025 Budget includes funding for this contract amendment in the City
Manager’s Office General Fund (Fund 011) budget.
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that that
the City Manager is authorized to amend Contract No. 32400129 with IGM Technology
Corporation for digital budget book services to add $45,203 for the annual service fees
and extend the contract term to January 31, 2027 with a not to exceed amount of
$85,203.
